title: CORA Crosswalk
description: A cross-standard mapping for a single concept across hosted standards.

concept.description: Canonical concept name in lowercase snake_case.

canonical_definition.description: Working definition of the concept, written by CORA maintainers.

aliases.description: Alternative names for this concept used in different communities.

boundary.description: True if this is a boundary crosswalk connecting to an adjacent ontology CORA does not host (e.g. MISMO, RealEstateCore, OSI).

mappings.description: Per-standard field mappings keyed by standard short name.

field.description: Field name or path in the standard. Null if not_present.

version.description: Standard version this mapping applies to.

confidence.description: Mapping confidence. divergent and not_present require a narrative.

notes.description: Required when confidence is divergent or not_present.

source_url.description: URL to the upstream documentation for this field.

maintainer.description: GitHub handle or team responsible for this crosswalk.

last_reviewed.description: ISO 8601 date of last maintainer review.
